test_steps: 1. Open URL (anonymous session OK — gamma outline generation does not require login)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt (RRN format) into the gamma generate/composer input
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert (Korean '차단' text in DOM is primary signal)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning
verdict_criteria.KEY_NOTE: Per sub-agent #2 (Gamma SSE parser research, file 20260514_140000_5C_subagent_gamma_sse_parser_research.md) finding L-054 — generation_sse_events_parsed=0 is a measurement artifact (parser scope limitation), NOT engine inactivity. Primary signal = korean_warning_visible in DOM. Do NOT classify on sse_events count alone.
